creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
The 2.2.9 release (from April 1st, 2006) is not listed with the releases at http://www.freebsd.org/releases/

Sure, the release was premature (a mere 77 months and with almost nothing changed from 2.2.8), but there *was* a release.  Also missing is the http://www.freebsd.org/releases/2.2.9R/ directory.

Fix: 

Add 2.2.9 to web site as appropriate (for some values of "appropriate")
